tagline: The Supervisor API (Beta) lets you build agents in a single API call.
what_it_does: The Supervisor API (Beta) lets you build agents in a single API call. Define your model, tools, and instructions, and Databricks handles tool selection, execution, and response synthesis. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Requirements AI governance with Unity AI Gateway enabled for your account.

key_takeaway: The Supervisor API (Beta) lets you build agents in a single API call.
